name: ai-voice-editor
description: An advanced voice tuner and sound mixer for content creators, featuring pitch tuning, background music mixing, noise reduction, and an AI mixing assistant.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk dist/app-debug.apk || echo 'APK copy failed'
scripts.lint: echo 'No JavaScript/TypeScript linting needed for native Kotlin Android project'

author: AI Studio
